description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The property features a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, a circular hot tub, and a patio with outdoor seating. The front includes a wide driveway leading to a three-car garage, landscaped with shrubs and decorative bushes. The rear of the house opens to a large pool deck, with a covered patio and additional outdoor furniture. Windows are arranged in vertical strips and large panels, providing ample natural light. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a neutral color palette.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with a pool, hot tub, three-car garage, and extensive outdoor living spaces. The design features clean lines, large windows, and a neutral color scheme.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the house with the swimming pool, hot tub, and patio area as prominent features.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, revealing the pool, hot tub, and a small gazebo structure, as well as the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the house, showcasing the driveway, three-car garage, main entryway, and landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 provides an angled view from above, displaying the roof layout, driveway, and the relationship between the house and outdoor amenities.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with steps, minimal overhang, and landscaped approach; features a modern door and integrated garage access.
